title: Explosions And Stuff
description: Added use for wardens! and explosions. For 1.21.1 Neoforge!
body:
# Explosions And Stuff

Welcome to Explosions And Stuff! This mod introduces a powerful, mid to end game weapon capable of unleashing devastating super-sonic explosions. Harness the power of the Warden to craft and control this ultimate tool of destruction.

## Features

### The Super Sonic Cannon

The heart of this mod is the **Super Sonic Cannon**. It is not an item you can hold, but rather a powerful event you can summon from the Warden realm.

- **Remote Activation:** Use the **Super Sonic Cannon Remote** to target a location. Upon use, a beam of energy will appear, charging up for a few seconds before unleashing a massive explosion.
- **Destructive Power:** The explosion is incredibly powerful, capable of obliterating terrain and any entities caught within its blast radius. Blocks are not destroyed but are instead sent flying.
- **Spectacular Effects:** The cannon's blast is a spectacle of its own, download it to see it for yourself!

### Items & Blocks

This mod adds several new items and a block, primarily centered around crafting and using the Super Sonic Cannon.

- **Super Sonic Cannon Remote:** The device used to call down the cannon's blast. It has a durability system:
    - **Super Sonic Cannon Remote:** The fresh, functional remote.
    - **Cracked Super Sonic Cannon Remote:** After one use, the remote becomes cracked. But can still be used one more time.
    - **Broken Super Sonic Cannon Remote:** After a second use, the remote breaks and becomes unusable until it is repaired.

- **Warden Antenna:** A new drop from the Warden. This is a key component for harnessing sonic power. It has a 50% chance of dropping 1 and 25% chance of dropping 2.

- **Warden Dust:** A refined material created by processing a Warden Antenna.

- **Warden Rod:** A rod crafted by covering a Lightning rod with Warden Dust. It is the core component for crafting and repairing the Super Sonic Cannon Remote.

### Crafting

- **Crafting the Remote:** You can craft a new **Super Sonic Cannon Remote** from scratch using a **Warden Rod**, a Lever, and an Iron Ingot.
- **Repairing the Remote:** Don't throw away your broken remotes! You can repair a **Cracked** or **Broken Super Sonic Cannon Remote** by combining it with a **Warden Rod** in a crafting grid.
- **Component Crafting:**
    - Turn one **Warden Antenna** into four pieces of **Warden Dust** at a Stonecutter or in a Crafting table.
    - Craft a **Warden Rod** by surrounding a Lightning Rod with 4 Warden Dust.
